description.en:
Green Horizon Industries introduces Industrial Hemp to Farming Simulator 25.
Phase 2.11 test build: fill types and Hemp Greenhouse store item are active. The main Blender generator now builds panels, grow-light wiring, and FS25-style helper nodes directly so GIANTS Editor export work can continue from one clean model script.

text.name: function_ghi_hempGreenhouse
text.en: Grows industrial hemp from water and hemp seed.
